root.warning.text: Root is not required. 80% of the improvement is achieved with ADB alone.

settings.title: Settings
guide.backup.title: Assistant — Full Backup
guide.backup.greeting: Hi! I'll guide you to back up everything before making changes. This is the most important step.
guide.backup.tip: Always back up before debloat or performance. If something goes wrong, you can restore everything.
guide.debloat.title: Assistant — Debloat
guide.debloat.greeting: I'll help you clean up bloatware. Choose a profile and customize what to remove.
guide.debloat.tip: Start with the "Safe" profile. You can always be more aggressive later.
guide.performance.title: Assistant — Performance
guide.performance.greeting: Let's speed up your Redmi 14C. All tweaks are root-free and reversible.
guide.performance.tip: 0.5x animations and disabling virtual RAM are the tweaks with the highest perceived impact.
guide.aesthetics.title: Assistant — Aesthetics
guide.aesthetics.greeting: Your Redmi 14C can look much better. Native blur, forced 90Hz and more.
guide.aesthetics.tip: Native blur + 90Hz are the changes that most transform the visual experience.
guide.rescue.title: Assistant — Rescue
guide.rescue.greeting: Something went wrong? Don't worry, everything is reversible. I'll help you restore.
guide.rescue.tip: The full restore script is your safety net. Download it before making changes.
guide.root.title: Assistant — Root (Optional)
guide.root.greeting: Root is optional and advanced. 80% of the improvement is achieved with ADB alone.
guide.root.tip: If you just want better performance, you don't need root. ADB tweaks give 80% of the result.
onboarding.intro: We'll guide you to optimize your Redmi 14C safely and reversibly.
onboarding.step1.title: Connect your phone
onboarding.step1.desc: Use an original USB cable and enable USB Debugging on your phone.
onboarding.step2.title: Back up first
onboarding.step2.desc: Before any changes, back up your important data.
onboarding.step3.title: Choose what to optimize
onboarding.step3.desc: Debloat, performance, aesthetics — you decide what to apply.
common.error.title: Something went wrong
